title: EnchantedBottles
description: Allow players to craft and store their Experience into physical bottles!
body:
This is a simple plugin that allows a way to store and retrieve experience. Using cauldrons makes it compatible (functionally) with Bedrock players.


Crafting
Craft a bottle using the following recipe:  
![Experience Bottle Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b3d9f354088a779cf3c66c75d4aa006079ba5b.png)

Interactions
Left click/Swing: returns all stored exp

(while standing in/on a cauldron)
Not Sneaking: stores 1 level of exp per second

Sneaking: stores ALL exp all at once

Support
Support is available using Github issues, or my Support Discord
